evidence_quote: From the homepage: "Generative AI and Automation for Longevity and Sustainability ... transforming drug discovery and development with generative artificial intelligence"; from the Pipeline page: "DIVERSIFIED PIPELINE DISCOVERED USING PHARMA.AI" with disclosed targets (USP1, QPCTL, KAT6, MAT2A, TEAD, ENPP1) that are small-molecule targets; products listed are software (PandaOmics, Chemistry42, Generative Biologics, inClinico).
disqualifier_reason: AI/computational-discovery-only with no antibody program; pipeline is small-molecule and platform is generative-AI software

evidence_quote: From the homepage: "what separates us from any other contract development and manufacturing organization (CDMO)"; services are Drug Substance (small-molecule API), Tides ("manufacturing of peptides and oligonucleotides"), Highly Potent APIs, Controlled Substances, and Drug Product. No antibody/biologics drug-substance (mammalian cell culture) capability disclosed.
disqualifier_reason: small-molecule / peptide-oligo CDMO with no antibody bioprocessing

evidence_quote: From the homepage: "Pure-play Cell Therapy CDMO and Gene Therapy CDMO delivering process development, cGMP manufacturing, and commercial supply" plus a "Biosafety Testing Laboratory" for "mAbs, viral vaccines, and advanced therapies." Antibody appears only as a testing substrate, not as a program they develop or manufacture.
disqualifier_reason: cell-therapy / gene-therapy CDMO plus biosafety testing lab; no antibody bioprocessing/manufacturing program

evidence_quote: From the homepage: "Jubilant HollisterStier CMO provides comprehensive sterile fill-finish and lyophilization services"; services listed are Sterile Fill-Finish, Lyophilization, Inspection and Packaging, Support Services. This is drug-product fill-finish, not antibody drug-substance bioprocessing.
disqualifier_reason: sterile fill-finish CMO (drug product only); no antibody bioprocessing/drug-substance program

programs: TRB-061 (TNFR2 agonist), TRB-071, TRB-081, TRB-051 (Lilly-partnered); Deep Biology Platform
evidence_quote: From the Pipeline page: "TRexBio is advancing a differentiated pipeline of biologics ... Our pipeline of large molecules"; from the TRB-061 page: "TRB-061 mimics the natural TNF ligand to selectively activate effector Tregs." Clearly a large-molecule/biologics developer, but no page names the format as an antibody, bispecific, ADC, or Fc-fusion; a TNFR2 agonist that 'mimics the natural TNF ligand' could be a ligand-mimetic/Fc-fusion rather than a genuine antibody, so the in-scope modality cannot be confirmed.
na_site_reasoning: program gate not passed (program is unclear); NA presence noted: South San Francisco CA R&D would qualify if program confirmed

evidence_quote: From the homepage: "Culture's cloud-connected bioreactors for cell culture experiments" and products Console ("bioprocess management software in the cloud"), Nexxys, and Stratyx ("Bioreactor platform"). They sell bioreactor hardware and bioprocess-development software/services, not antibody therapeutics or antibody CDMO bioprocessing.
disqualifier_reason: bioreactor hardware + bioprocess software vendor (equipment/tools supplier); no antibody program

evidence_quote: From the Biomanufacturing Services page: "Our primary focus is viral vector manufacturing"; from the homepage: "producing and testing today's leading oncolytic viruses, gene therapies, immunotherapies, viral vaccines, and recombinant protein vaccines." Product types are viral vectors (AAV, lentivirus, adenovirus, VSV, etc.); no antibody bioprocessing disclosed.
disqualifier_reason: viral-vector / vaccine CDMO; no antibody bioprocessing program

evidence_quote: From the homepage: "We are a personalized CDMO" with services Drug Product Fill Finish ("manufacturing sterile injectable products"), Combination Drug Product Assembly, Drug Development & Analytical Services, and Drug Delivery Design. Injectable fill-finish CDMO, not antibody drug-substance bioprocessing.
disqualifier_reason: injectable fill-finish CDMO (drug product only); no antibody bioprocessing program
